title: How a Man of God Leads a Room He's Not in Charge Of
caption:
Leadership doesn't start with a title. It starts with going first when nobody's asked you to.

Say the hard thing before someone has to. Own your twenty percent before you name his eighty. Take the job with no name on it. Protect a friend's name even when he's not in the room to hear it. Stay when it would be easier to drift.

Whoever is greatest among you shall be your servant. (Matthew 23:11)

Christ washed feet before he ever raised his voice. That's the order. Service first, authority second, if it ever comes at all.

You don't need a badge to lead a room. You just have to be the one who goes first.

#faith #christianmen #leadership #discipline #godlymen #manofgod #brotherhood
theme: He leads by going first into the cost.
